| Feature | Subject | Specimens | Summary |
| --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| `feature/sim-web/view-surface` | `crate/sim-lib-view` | 0 | Expose view and edit surfaces so codecs, browser hosts, and device profiles can render and reverse surface data. |
